hero.title: Building sustainable business that performs
hero.description: We help organizations integrate ESG into strategy, operations, and reporting — turning sustainability into measurable business value.

about.label: Maharani Prima
description: PT. Maharani Prima is a Jakarta-based EPCC company founded in 2012, specializing in wellpad preparation, mining & hauling, piping & metering, and power plant projects — committed to delivering every project on scope, on time, and within budget.

Backed by end-to-end expertise across design, engineering, construction, and commissioning, PT. Maharani Prima delivers value-driven solutions tailored to each client — with a skilled team ready to tackle complex challenges across diverse locations.

stats.title: On Schedule
stats.desc: Capacitate the company with competent staff

stats.title: On Budget
stats.desc: We do productivity at minimal cost

stats.title: On Quality
stats.desc: Maintain a high level of professionalism

stats.title: On Safety
stats.desc: Ensure to follow the government regulation

Cta.title: Active in more than 100 EPCC projects across the archipelago, Maharani Prima has solid tracks in Indonesian EPCC business

core.title: Supporting every step, from land analysis to sustainable growth

coresData.title: Mining & Hauling
coresData.desc: Excavation & hauling, ore surveys, road maintenance, re-engineering fills, loading & barging.

coresData.title: Wellpad & Earth Works
coresData.desc: Deep bulk excavation & hauling, surveys & volumetric calculation, road & facility maintenance, piling & rig foundation, mud pit installation & stabilizing fills.

coresData.title: Surface Facility Oil & Gas
coresData.desc: Engineering & construction, earth works, technical procurement, piping construction & metering installation, electrical & instrument installation

coresData.title: HV & MV Transmission Line
coresData.desc: Power foundation for 70 & 150 KV lines, cable pulling & accessories installation, open cut, manual boring & HDD cable installation, testing & commissioning, panel SCADA & electric breaker installation.

coresData.title: Power Plant
coresData.desc: Earth works & civil works, technical procurement, mechanical & rotating equipment installation, electrical & instrument installation, testing & commissioning.

records.title: Sustainability: From initiative to strategy return to Records

recordsData.title: 9 Power Plant
recordsData.desc: Delivered 9 power plant projects spanning coal-fired, gas, diesel, hydro, and geothermal power facilities.

recordsData.title: 8 Metering Station & Facility
recordsData.desc: Completed 8 metering station & facility projects covering gas metering, crude oil metering, and fuel terminal installations.

recordsData.title: 550 km Power Transmission
recordsData.desc: Installed 550 km of power transmission lines including 410 km underground MV, 40 km upper ground MV, 40 km upper ground HV, and 60 km HDD MV distribution.

recordsData.title: 130 km Pipeline Construction
recordsData.desc: Built 130 km of pipelines covering distribution, gas transmission, and HDD pipeline construction across multiple project sites.

recordsData.title: 220 Well Facility
recordsData.desc: Executed 220 well facility projects including rig substructure installation, wellhead installation, and 300 km of wellpad road construction.

recordsData.title: Mining & Hauling
recordsData.desc: Moved more than 3,000,000 m³ of fresh soil and hauled over 600,000 m³ of gravel across mining sites.

products.title: Help build a cleaner, brighter energy future.

productsData.title: FusionSolar Smart Microgrid
productsData.desc: One-fits-all and standardized off-grid and grid-connected power solution, accelerating low-carbon transformation for mining and industrial operations.

point.title: Microgrid definition
desc: A group of interconnected loads and distributed energy resources within clearly defined electrical boundaries
Acts as a single controllable entity with respect to the grid
Operates in either grid-connected or in island mode

point.title: Distributed Power System
desc: Connects to a 35 kV or lower power grid, located near users, and mainly used for local consumption
Involves a wide variety of energy sources.

point.title: Energy Storage System (ESS)
desc: Functions as a load that stores the electric energy generated by a distributed power system
Functions as a distributed power system that discharges electric energy to loads

productsData.title: Selerys - LAICO™ SOBLI
productsData.desc: One-fits-all and standardized off-grid and grid-connected power solution, accelerating low-carbon transformation for mining and industrial operations.

point.title: Cloud Detection & Early Warning
desc: Radar detects cumulus clouds with storm potential moving toward the mine site. Two-stage alerts are issued at 30 km and 15 km — delivered via software dashboard and WhatsApp.

point.title: Smart Balloon Deployment & Cloud Seeding
desc: When the cloud's motion cone approaches, the balloon is deployed via a single software  command. The GPS-guided balloon with hygroscopic flare is drawn into the cloud's updraft core, releasing the flare precisely to disperse cloud particles before rainfall.

point.title: Rainfall Measurement & Performance Monitoring
desc: Automatic rainfall stations compare rain-hours and rainfall volume inside vs. outside the mine  site. Data is captured in real time through the integrated software platform to validate diversion effectiveness.

hardware.title: Balloon is aspired into the cloud & spray the agent
